allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive transformation rules documentation

- Documented all evolved rules from v1.0 to v6.0
- Target audience: business executives, not tech experts
- File naming: Korean with dates
- Structure: TOC, 핵심, diagrams with purpose, plain language
- Examples of good vs bad practices
- Checklist for each section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove diagram purpose headers and fix formatting

- Removed "🎯 이 다이어그램이 설명하는 것:" headers
- Fixed "📌 핵심:" logical gap in intro \(added Meta 10kW context\)
- Removed traffic light emojis from TOC numbered list
- Fixed bullet point spacing issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
